name: Synup Social vs. MeetEdgar
hero_summary: Love how MeetEdgar helps you post (and repost, and repost, and repost)? Then you’ll love Synup Social. Instead of filling your feed with the greatest hits, inject it with what’s happening here and now. With insights into your best posts and what’s trending in your industry, Synup Social will have you running circles around your old performance stats. Plus, agencies can join in on the fun, too! With expanded capabilities to create data-informed posts based on trends or past performance, Synup Social is the clear choice for businesses looking to up their social media game.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Synup Social empowers you to do more with less. While MeetEdgar is a great introduction into AI-assisted content creation and post recycling, Synup Social takes things to the next level. Take a look at why Synup Social is the #1 MeetEdgar alternative:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Your social media needs to be data-driven - and that means having the right tool. MeetEdgar’s analytics lack the post-by-post analysis that lets you see what drives day-to-day engagement. With Synup Social, you can see which posts are driving engagement over time with interactive engagement graphs and easily track and monitor your brand’s performance over time. Get ready for major growth.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Say goodbye to writer’s block! Synup Social helps you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. While MeetEdgar provides no content creation support, Synup inspires your top-performing posts. Take the hassle out of social media management with competitor tracking, trend forecasting, post analytics, and more, and get ready to smash your engagement goals!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: Effective collaboration is essential for your team’s success. Whether it’s coordinating with clients or just banishing time-sucking meetings, Synup Social streamlines your workflow. Team members can collaborate on posts together, submitting posts to supervisors and clients so they can approve posts and provide feedback. Easy peasy!
section_2_slider_4_summary: MeetEdgar doesn’t support multi-brand or multi-location posting, making it a no-go for any agencies or enterprises. Synup Social was built with agencies in mind, making it easy to manage multiple brands (or locations!) on one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over MeetEdgar?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: MeetEdgar and Synup Social are both renowned for their innovative content creation capabilities. While they both make it easy to post, Synup Social takes the cake with superior analytics, AI-powered post generation, affordable pricing, collaborative abilities, and user-friendliness. Synup Social is perfect for small businesses, agencies, and enterprises alike!
